expected_behavior: Readiness succeeds only when required components and active policy/RLS inventory are valid; a tenant-isolation and egress-deny smoke flow completes.
given: A new evaluator uses the documented local/on-prem VS2 quickstart without live provider credentials.
notes: Scenario-specific validator executed against local synthetic users, tenants, policy, Postgres RLS, OPA, egress, audit, and regression evidence as applicable.
required_evidence: Command transcript with exit codes, component versions, policy revision, RLS inventory, generated IDs, elapsed time.
then: Readiness succeeds only when required components and active policy/RLS inventory are valid; a tenant-isolation and egress-deny smoke flow completes.
when: They start CornerStone, Postgres, OPA, and the local egress test harness.
